---
title: "Data Visualization"
toc: true
---

## AfroData Visualization Hub

<a href="https://www.instagram.com/afro_dataviz/" target="_blank" class="ig-button"> 📷 Afro Data Visualization Hub on Instagram </a>

```{=html}
<style> .ig-button { display: inline-block; background: linear-gradient(45deg, #f09433 0%, #e6683c 25%, #dc2743 50%, #cc2366 75%, #bc1888 100%); color: white; padding: 15px 30px; text-decoration: none; border-radius: 25px; font-weight: bold; text-align: center; transition: transform 0.3s ease; } .ig-button:hover { transform: translateY(-2px); } </style>
```

## Kenya in Numbers

<a href="https://www.instagram.com/kenya.in.numbers/" target="_blank" class="ig-button"> 📷 Kenya in Numbers on Instagram </a>

```{=html}
<style> .ig-button { display: inline-block; background: linear-gradient(45deg, #f09433 0%, #e6683c 25%, #dc2743 50%, #cc2366 75%, #bc1888 100%); color: white; padding: 15px 30px; text-decoration: none; border-radius: 25px; font-weight: bold; text-align: center; transition: transform 0.3s ease; } .ig-button:hover { transform: translateY(-2px); } </style>
```
